repositoryProfile.stack: RuoYi + Vue3 + Codex Auto Dev OS

mustReadFiles.reason: Compact current handoff for new Codex windows.
Latest project handoff and verification boundary.
Feature ownership and active customer context.
Current change allowed and forbidden edit roots.

mustNotBreak: Do not implement sales-order in this governance change.
Do not modify customer-management business code in governance/rule-change work.
Do not change database business table structure in this governance change.
Do not loosen existing governance gates or profile lock.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Complex feature work needs product, architecture, backend, frontend, and QA review before implementation.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Run review:feature for the sales-order proposal and record the decision before implementation.

roadmapBlockers.reason: New Codex windows need a compact, deterministic handoff instead of reading all history.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Run npm run context:build -- customer before sales-order planning.

roadmapBlockers.reason: The generated current context must stay bounded, structured, and reasoned.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Keep current-context deterministic and below the line/read-budget thresholds.

roadmapBlockers.reason: AGENTS, README, project state, handover, context, and review summaries must not grow without control.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Split or summarize oversized governance docs instead of appending indefinitely.

roadmapBlockers.reason: New sessions should read the smallest useful context set.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Add extra must-read files only with a written reason.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Large Vue, Java service, and mapper files need split plans or exceptions when touched.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Before touching heavy files, add a split plan or weight exception to the change record.

roadmapBlockers.reason: The enhancement backlog must stay complete enough to drive gate decisions.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Keep backlog item evidence and futureAction fields non-empty.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Sales-order, delivery, finance, and production sequencing must be machine-checkable.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Mark beforeSalesOrder ready only after required items are completed.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Known customer debt must be visible before order-dependent modules are started.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Resolve or explicitly accept debt before dependent sales-order behavior is implemented.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Sales order must preserve customer/contact/address state even if customer master data changes later.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Draft snapshot contract in the sales-order pre-review batch.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Order state transitions must be stable before delivery, finance, and production depend on them.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Draft state-machine contract in the sales-order pre-review batch.

roadmapBlockers.reason: Customer deposit, order deposit, receipt, deduction, refund, and adjustment responsibilities must not blur.
roadmapBlockers.futureAction: Draft fund-boundary contract before order fund behavior.

beforeSalesOrder.title: Before sales-order implementation

deferred.reason: Can wait until the current-context package and sales-order contract scope are stable.
Dependency-closure selection should be added after the first compact context workflow is proven.
Deep feature coverage checks need approved sales-order contract files first.
Dependency matrix visualization is deferred until sales-order/delivery/finance boundaries exist.
Requires approved API contracts and runtime fixtures.
Requires approved UI screens and browser acceptance path.
CI is deferred to avoid fake echo-success automation before local gates are stable.

beforeSalesOrder.evidence: This governance change creates the gate and its checkers; business implementation remains blocked until required contract items are completed. The phase-gate checker covers canonical sales-order roots plus common sales-order, salesOrder, sales_order, and sales/order naming variants under implementation roots.

beforeDelivery.title: Before delivery implementation
beforeDelivery.evidence: Delivery is deferred until sales-order state and shipment boundaries exist.

beforeFinance.title: Before finance implementation
beforeFinance.evidence: Finance is deferred until fund and receipt responsibilities are explicit.

beforeProduction.title: Before production implementation
beforeProduction.evidence: Production is deferred until payment and release policy are explicit.

refactorDebt.title: Customer contacts and addresses are soft-deleted and reinserted
refactorDebt.guard: beforeSalesOrder remains blocked until the snapshot contract defines required customer/contact/address snapshot fields.

refactorDebt.title: PUT /business/customer is a full-update API
refactorDebt.guard: Current-context and sales-order review must call out the full-update boundary.

refactorDebt.title: Database direction is MySQL
refactorDebt.guard: Roadmap and context files must keep MySQL as the default database assumption.

refactorDebt.title: CHANGE_SALESMAN owner-change mode is incomplete
refactorDebt.guard: Sales-order review must not depend on unclear owner-change semantics.

refactorDebt.title: business:customer:fund:adjust is reserved
refactorDebt.guard: Fund-boundary contract must distinguish deposit entry, deduction, refund, adjustment, and reversal responsibilities.

nextSteps: Before sales-order implementation, run review:feature and require decision.md to explicitly contain Allow Implementation.
Complete snapshot, state-machine, and fund-boundary contracts before creating sales-order code or tables.
